title: The Climb Becomes Dangerous
description: On pages 13–16, the climb becomes dangerous as luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields.
scene: The Climb Becomes Dangerous. Luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your majesty! I have an urgent report!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: It's those pirates from yester- day!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Their ship is docked by the river!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Those straw hats dare tread foot upon my kingdom!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: those scum have quite the nerve, after what they did to me...!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Find and kill every last one of them at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, that's... none of them are presently on their ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're not sure where they went off to.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What an incompetent bunch...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Looking at the footprints left behind in the snow,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: chief staff officer of the former drum kingdom CHESS

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It seems they've headed for big horn, your majesty.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Chief magistrate of the former drum kingdom KUROMARIMO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well done. Then we shall first head for big horn instead.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Let us celebrate the rebirth of drum kingdom with their extermination!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cocoa weed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She already left!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We just missed her!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She treated me just a little while ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you looking for the doctor, Dalton?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, it's an emergency. Do you know where she went!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I think I heard someone say that she left for Gyasta.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyasta?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's a village by the lake shore, much farther up north from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ice skating is quite popular there.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well we don't have time to loiter around here forever! We should go there immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dalton, are you there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What is it? Wait, aren't you supposed to be on guard duty today...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All the guards other than me were done in!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: The ship just... surfaced from below the sea all of a sudden and attacked everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: You've got to come and help, Dalton! We-

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Calm down and speak. Who was it that attacked the guards?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: It was Wapol!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: He's come back!

summary: This part centers on the climb becomes dangerous, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
